name: Multiemployer Plan Amortization Extension Election

eligibility.description: Multiemployer pension plans meeting specific solvency tests that experienced investment losses or COVID-19 related experience losses.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows multiemployer plans to elect to amortize net investment losses over 30 years rather than 15 years, and to expand the asset smoothing period to 10 years.
